scripts.dev: npm run dev:clean-ports && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.quality:gates: npm run build && npm run test && npx tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && npm audit --audit-level=high
